summary: Tighten pinch contact, smooth the page cursor, and visually connect a compact controller window to the page entry dot.
scope: require near-contact thumb-index pinch before showing or activating the cursor
sync hand states at 30 FPS and animate the webpage cursor between updates
use an opaque 36px green cursor with a subtle shadow
open a compact controller near the right-side entry dot with expand-collapse feedback
notes: Chrome native extension windows cannot be embedded in a webpage; the entry-dot transition provides the visual continuity.
